texto: Dancing as if language had surrendered to movement - as if this ritual, this wordless ceremony, was now the way to speak, to whisper private and sacred things, to be in touch with some otherness. Dancing as if the very heart of life and all its hopes might be found in those assuaging notes and those hushed rhythms and in those silent and hypnotic movements. Dancing as if language no longer existed because words were no longer necessary...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brian Friel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Dancing as if language had surrendered to movement - as if this ritual, this wordless ceremony, w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, dancing, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e language.

frase_original: Dancing as if language had surrendered to movement - as if this ritual, this wordless ceremony, was now the way to speak, to whisper private and sacred things, to be in touch with some otherness. Dancing as if the very heart of life and all its hopes might be found in those assuaging notes and those hushed rhythms and in those silent and hypnotic movements. Dancing as if language no longer existed because words were no longer necessary...

texto: ...that it is not the literal past, the 'facts' of history, that shape us, but images of the past embodied in language.
explicacao: Citação de Brian Friel sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “...that it is not the literal past, the 'facts' of history, that shape us, but images of the past…” articula reflexao, history, identity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como identity e irish.
